hotspots.label: Iconic gate on Lake Lugano
hotspots.description: An ornate wrought-iron gate in Parco Ciani framing a scenic view of Lake Lugano and the surrounding mountains. It is a popular landmark for tourist photography and special occasions.
hotspots.search_prompt: ornate wrought iron gate between stone pillars with mountain lake background

hotspots.label: Monte San Salvatore mountain
hotspots.description: The distinctive conical peak of Monte San Salvatore viewed across Lake Lugano from the grounds of Parco Ciani.
hotspots.search_prompt: a large conical green mountain across a body of water

hotspots.label: Reflective sphere sculpture Lugano
hotspots.description: A large, polished stainless steel spherical sculpture featuring a jagged, textured horizontal fissure that reflects its park and lakeside surroundings.
hotspots.search_prompt: highly polished mirror finish steel sphere sculpture with horizontal crumpled texture

hotspots.label: Lakeside tulips in Parco Ciani
hotspots.description: Seasonal flower beds filled with colorful tulips and groundcover flowers located along the lakefront promenade in Lugano.
hotspots.search_prompt: colorful tulips in a park flower bed next to blue lake water and a stone wall

hotspots.label: Villa Ciani in Lugano
hotspots.description: A historic peach-colored neoclassical villa located within Parco Ciani, featuring a distinctive central cupola and surrounded by manicured flowerbeds.
hotspots.search_prompt: peach-colored neoclassical villa with a central dome cupola and flower gardens in front

hotspots.label: Topiary tree at Lake Lugano
hotspots.description: A distinctive cloud-pruned Japanese cypress topiary situated along the shore of Lake Lugano in Parco Ciani. It is typically photographed with the iconic Monte San Salvatore in the background.
hotspots.search_prompt: cloud-pruned topiary tree with round green foliage clusters overlooking a lake and a prominent mountain

hotspots.label: LongLake Festival live performance
hotspots.description: Live musical performances on an outdoor stage during the LongLake Festival in Parco Ciani, Lugano. The images depict various bands and musicians performing under vibrant stage lighting with festival branding visible.
hotspots.search_prompt: live band performing on a concert stage with stage lights and LongLake festival signage

hotspots.label: Azaleas at Parco Ciani
hotspots.description: Vibrant pink and white azalea bushes blooming along the shoreline of Lake Lugano. This scenic spot in the park is famous for its colorful spring floral displays against the backdrop of the lake and mountains.
hotspots.search_prompt: blooming pink and white azalea bushes on a lakeside with mountains in the background

hotspots.label: Illuminated deer light sculpture
hotspots.description: Large wireframe sculptures of deer or reindeer covered in warm white LED lights, typically installed in Parco Ciani for the Christmas season. They are often positioned along the lakeside promenade overlooking Lake Lugano.
hotspots.search_prompt: a wireframe deer sculpture covered in warm white Christmas lights

hotspots.label: Poppies in Parco Ciani
hotspots.description: The images feature vibrant white and pink poppies blooming in Parco Ciani, set against the scenic backdrop of Lake Lugano and surrounding mountains.
hotspots.search_prompt: white and pink poppies in a lakeside park with mountains in the background
